steps.task: Review and revise context/trust_moa.md until the Trust MoA design reflects the intended mechanism.
Reconcile context/trust_moa.html with the revised context/trust_moa.md so the visual explainer is complete and accurate.
Reconcile README.md with the approved Trust MoA design while keeping the README concise and linking deeper material instead of duplicating it.
Review and approve the revised README.md.

After the user gives Codex an explicit green light, design the complete system and write the execution plan. Decide whether the primary experience is CLI-based, UI-based, or hybrid; define the architecture, Codex-first runtime, host adapters, agent interfaces, artifact handoffs, state, quality gates, repair loops, JSON logging, and demo-generation path.
steps.decision: Hybrid: Codex-chat workflows over an internal deterministic engine, with a UI-first observational Control Room for delivery runs.

steps.task: Implement the complete ZeroHandoff training and inference scaffolds, from puzzle-run initialization and day/night orchestration through build-request intake and final delivery-bundle assembly, including configuration, persistence, gates, bounded repair, runtime adapters, append-only JSON logging, and test fixtures for agent-free execution.

verification.control_room: TypeScript typecheck and Vite production build passed
verification.live_runtime: GPT-5.6 Sol structured-output and isolated workspace-write probes passed

steps.task: Run an end-to-end smoke test without live agents, using deterministic fixtures or mocks to verify the training and inference control flow, stage transitions, artifact handoffs, quality gates, repair paths, JSON logs, and final delivery-bundle assembly.

verification.training: 10 rounds, 70/70 valid episodes, exactly 420 fixture calls, frozen digest verified
verification.delivery: All seven artifact stages plus demo and bundle completed
verification.repair: One deliberate SHAPE failure repaired within budget with both versions preserved
verification.evidence: 31 delivery calls, 11 gate records, 60 bundle checksums with zero failures
verification.archive: delivery_bundle.zip passed full ZIP integrity validation
verification.media: Narrated MP4 contains video and audio and decodes at 3 seconds
verification.regression: 21 Python tests, Control Room typecheck, and Vite production build passed
verification.fix: Custom safe delivery run IDs are now consistently discoverable and readable by status/API

steps.task: Create and validate the deterministic puzzle corpus and its tooling, including correctness, uniqueness, clue splitting, leakage prevention, difficulty ordering, grading, and timeout behavior.

verification.corpus: 10 deterministic seed-42 puzzles: 8 logic grids and 2 graph routes
verification.correctness: Every combined clue set has one solver-confirmed answer and every private half is insufficient
verification.quality: Unique IDs/specs, clue minimality, ordered difficulty, answer-leakage prevention, equivalent-format grading, reproducibility, and timeout behavior passed
verification.isolation: Training and curation Codex calls are prompt-only with file, shell, app, browser, image, web, and multi-agent tools disabled
verification.regression: 28 Python tests, non-live doctor, Control Room typecheck, and Vite production build passed

steps.task: Run the real ten-round day/night Trust MoA training across the seven two-agent teams, capture all training logs and metrics, produce the directed relationship vectors, and freeze those vectors for inference.

readiness.relationship_policy: Versioned deterministic compiler injects up to three strong non-trust dimensions as qualitative guidance while trust remains the sole authority signal
readiness.curator_evidence: Each Curator receives the complete four-message episode, answers, reward/RPE, diary evidence, current memory, memory policy, metaplasticity, peer identity, and current vector
readiness.audit_outputs: Round-zero vectors, relationship_policies.jsonl, and consolidated training_results.json are implemented
readiness.reasoning: Puzzle solvers use medium; the single Curator uses xhigh
readiness.regression: 30 Python tests passed after live training and report finalization; live Codex doctor and locked-corpus checks passed before training
readiness.outcome: 10/10 rounds, 70/70 valid episodes, 63 wins, 280 accepted solver calls, 140 accepted Curator calls, and 431 total attempts including retries/rejections

steps.task: Run the complete autonomous product-lifecycle inference pipeline with the trained agents, from the Build Request through SENSE Opportunity Model, MODEL Outcome Model, COMPOSE Capability Graph, DECIDE Decision Graph, SIMULATE Scenario Model, EXECUTE Autonomous Change, OBSERVE Evidence + Learning, and the narrated demo.

preconditions.training_baseline: immutable forever; copied into separate inference state
preconditions.inference_trust: run-start snapshot remains stable; alpha 0.05; step cap +/-0.1; cross-team edges start 0.0
preconditions.reward: next team accepts = 1; next team requests revision = 0
preconditions.night_commit: one xhigh curator commits shadow trust and consolidated memory after one completed prototype

policy_defaults_approved.update_scope: six edges per handoff: two producer-pair edges plus four receiver-to-producer edges
policy_defaults_approved.expectation: one RPE expectation per directed edge, initialized at 0.5
policy_defaults_approved.terminal_observe: no trust reward because no eighth team consumes OBSERVE
policy_defaults_approved.night_curator_identity: dedicated internal system curator, not one of the 14 delivery agents

verification.run: step10_shiftpulse_live_20260715 completed SENSE, MODEL, COMPOSE, DECIDE, SIMULATE, EXECUTE, OBSERVE, DEMO, and BUNDLE
verification.product: ShiftPulse React/TypeScript/Vite application; 14 application tests, typecheck, and production build passed
verification.learning: 6 canonical handoff rewards, 36 canonical shadow updates, 36 trust edges changed by +0.025, and all non-trust dimensions remained unchanged
verification.lineage: Frozen training digest sha256:b0849f195010cbedca942a351f6005dc8e91959b8f276ab4dec86bfd9baef324 remained valid; corrected inference commit sequence 1 ends at sha256:85c7f5a8c7f89c5921705b4afdf63bc99a0755ce92c91506da9d71be5ae04b72
verification.resume_integrity: Retry-duplicated learning evidence was detected before approval, preserved, explicitly invalidated, and replaced by canonical 6/36 evidence without hiding the audit trail
verification.demo: Browser-captured, visually non-blank 8-second H.264/AAC narrated MP4 passed video, audio, duration, checksum, and visual-content gates
verification.bundle: 120-file delivery bundle excludes node_modules and passed independent checksum and manifest-digest validation
verification.regression: 41 Python tests passed; Control Room typecheck/build passed

steps.task: Review smoke-test, training, and inference evidence; make the necessary corrections and iterations; and rerun affected checks until the agreed quality gates pass.
steps.scope_decision: The user reduced the planned ten-run campaign to recovery of Experiment 3 plus exactly one additional experiment; Experiments 5-10 were cancelled.

verification.lineage_recovery: Invalid Experiment 3 inference commit 4 was preserved as superseded, verified sequence 3 was restored, and corrected PolicyProof committed exactly once as sequence 4.
verification.atomic_handoffs: Every assessment is durable before repair; rejection reward 0 survives successful revision; pre-Night requires current producer artifact, evidence, ancestry, six rewards, and 36 matching shadows.
verification.policyproof: Corrected PolicyProof scored 100/100 with rewards [1,1,1,1,0,1] and all trust invariants passing.
verification.coveragecanvas: CoverageCanvas scored 100/100, produced a 54.04-second interactive narrated demo and 117-file verified bundle, and committed inference sequence 5 only after all gates passed.
verification.continual_learning: CoverageCanvas changed 36 trust edges, updated memory for all 14 agents, and left all nine non-trust dimensions and the immutable training snapshot unchanged.

steps.task: Prepare and verify the complete hackathon package: runnable application, source and setup instructions, automated tests and quality evidence, representative append-only JSON logs, narrated video demo, submission copy, and rules-compliance checklist.

verification.package: 55 files checksummed and independently reverified; representative training, delivery, trust-lineage, audit, media, and bundle evidence included
verification.submission_video: 73.942-second English H.264/AAC video with presenter-quality narration, system overview, seven-stage pipeline, and real interactive CoverageCanvas workflow
verification.generated_demo: 54.04-second autonomous CoverageCanvas demo retained separately with audio, motion, interaction evidence, and no music
verification.judge_sandbox: Fresh temporary copy installed from package-lock with 0 vulnerabilities; 9 unit/browser tests, two production builds, and real Chrome acceptance passed
verification.repository: 88 Python tests passed; Control Room typecheck and Vite production build passed; pip check and npm audits passed
verification.runtime: Codex CLI 0.144.4, authentication, 14 agent configs, 3 chat skills, Chrome, FFmpeg, settings, and puzzle corpus doctor checks passed
verification.evidence: Canonical exp04_coveragecanvas_20260717 audit remains 100/100 with six rewards, 36 shadow updates, one Night commit, and every trust invariant true
verification.security_and_ip: Focused credential scan found no secrets; MIT license and direct dependency notices added; demo uses original visuals, fictional data, and no music

steps.task: Review the final package and submit the ZeroHandoff project to the OpenAI Build Week hackathon.

implementation_gate.rule: Step 5 starts only when the user gives an explicit green light; do not begin its Codex-owned design work or any later execution step before that approval.
implementation_gate.evidence: The user explicitly requested execution of plan step 5 in this Codex task.
